blended.narrative: Lost Trail is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 3,416 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 5" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 33.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 18" over the past week. Current depth: 73".
